text: UAE Central Bank Law expands licensing to cover open finance and virtual asset payments
CBUAE one-year reconciliation period for compliance closes September 16 2026
DFSA crypto token regulatory framework updates take effect January 12 2026
UAE Securities authority rebranded as Capital Market Authority effective January 2026

Digital Dirham to expand into peer-to-peer and cross-border use cases throughout 2026
UAE telecom operator du launches 50 million dollar fintech venture fund
Saudi Arabia opens mobile wallet market to foreign players in 2026
SAMA and Ant International to launch cross-border QR payments via mada and Alipay+
Google Pay launches Tap to Pay in Saudi Arabia via Mastercard SAMA partnership
